title: pellaea deltoidea
intro: Pellaea deltoidea, also known as the American sword fern, is a species of fern native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pellaea deltoidea include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Pellaea deltoidea can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
